home.java_error_desc:
Java not found in system variables! Please install Java, otherwise server mode will be unavailable!

Suggestions:
1. Download and install Java 17 or higher
2. Configure Java environment variables
3. Restart the application
home.unknown_error_desc: An unknown error occurred, please contact technical support
home.ws_error_desc: Unable to establish WebSocket connection with backend

home.suggestion_check_logs: Check log files for more information

setting.system_autozip_desc: Automatically package to zip after server production is completed (not packaged in server mode)

modal.backend_error_content:
Backend connection failed
Error: {error}

Suggestions:
1. Check if backend service is started
2. Check if port 37019 is occupied
3. Try restarting the application
